title: Gemini Knot Wrap
description: Releasing as part of our Zodiac 2024 collection, Gemini Knot Wrap is a reusable gift wrapping option, made from 100% recycled plastic bottles.

images.alt: Gemini. A vibrantly, colourful square knot wrap with a striped border. The centre has a large diamond shape showing the Gemini star sign, and playful sun and moon depictions.

Two similar-looking models wearing the same outfit with the same hairstyle have fashioned the Gemini knot wrap into a stylish head bandana and are standing facing towards and away from the camera to show each angle.
The two similar-looking models are wearing a white tank top with the Gemini knot wrap fashioned into a stylish head bandana standing back to back on a sparkling pink background.

Two similar-looking models wearing the same outfit with the same hairstyle have fashioned the Gemini knot wrap into a stylish head bandana and are standing facing towards and away from the camera to show each angle.
A super close-up image of the Gemini knot wrap to focus on the vibrant contrasting colours and the texture of the fabric. The area focused on has a checkered pattern of brightly coloured squares.

A super close-up image of the Gemini knot wrap to focus on the vibrant contrasting colours and the texture of the fabric. The area focused on has a section of dark, starry sky and a fraction of colourful border.
